violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Potentially hazardous food Had an internal temperature of 44 F.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. A scoop handle was stored in the bread crumbs.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items . Fly spray was stored on top of a upright freezer.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
